questions.question: A time series model has been fitted to the data. However, upon further analysis, the model seems to underfit the data. What are some possible reasons for this, and how could they be addressed through model multiplicity?
questions.hint: Consider the implications of each choice on your analysis

questions.question: What is a key benefit of using model multiplicity in time series analysis, and how might it be used to improve the accuracy of your predictions?
questions.hint: Think about how different models can be combined to improve overall performance

questions.question: Suppose you have two time series models with different parameters that produce similar predictions. How would you determine which model is better, and what implications does this have for your analysis?
questions.hint: Consider how model multiplicity can be used to evaluate the performance of different models
